source_urls: r/Ecoflow_community - Reddit: I measured the Ecoflow Delta 2 EPS transfer speeds with some different loads (the 30ms they state is very misleading)

The Solar Lab: EcoFlow DELTA 2 Max Review: Is It Still Worth Buying Years Later?
EcoFlow Official Documentation: EcoFlow DELTA 2 Max User Manual V1.0
Total Tools Presentation: Introducing EcoFlow DELTA 2 Max
Fair Trade Finder (Video/Article): Anker PowerHouse 767 vs EcoFlow Delta 2 Max: How Do They Compare?
Independent Testing: EcoFlow Delta 2 Max - Roundtrip Efficiency Test
praise: High inverter efficiency measured at approximately 86% to 88%
Quiet operation during use with reported noise levels around 30 dB
Substantial solar input capacity of 1,000W relative to battery size
Expandable storage capacity up to 6,144Wh via extra batteries
Fast AC charging capable of reaching 80% in approximately 68 minutes
Low idle power draw compared to larger capacity units
Responsive mobile application for remote monitoring and control
Grounded AC outlet availability with six total ports
Durable build quality including a fire-resistant 5VA rated shell
LFP battery chemistry supporting up to 3,000 cycles to 80% capacity
friction: Reports of Emergency Power Supply (EPS) transfer speeds exceeding 30ms under low loads
Reports of sporadic battery percentage drops and BMS calibration issues
Reports of inaccuracies between displayed AC output and actual device draw
Lack of a built-in LED light for emergency visibility
Absence of wheels on the unit despite a weight of approximately 50 lbs
Reports of X-Boost functionality being inconsistent with sensitive electronics
Reports of solar input ports occasionally misidentifying panels as car chargers
Limited surge headroom when attempting to start high-demand appliances
Reports of high variability in switchover times with low power factor loads
Reports of firmware updates not fully resolving transfer speed inconsistencies
themes: Real-world EPS performance versus advertised specifications
Battery Management System (BMS) stability and calibration
Inverter efficiency and idle power consumption
Solar and AC recharging speed performance
